metadata.title: DOCEtaxel 75 mg/m² – Prednisolone Combination Therapy
metadata.indication: Docetaxel with prednisone/prednisolone for hormone-refractory metastatic prostate cancer.
metadata.partial_assessment_note: Any independently actionable entered value is assessed; omitted domains remain explicitly unassessed and never block a partial result.

clinical_governance.prescriptive_authority: Treatment plan must be initiated by the appropriately qualified Consultant specified in the NCCP source.
clinical_governance.dose_modification_note: Any dose modification or non-standard continuation should be discussed with a Consultant.
clinical_governance.disclaimer: Decision-support encoding of the current NCCP source. It does not replace the official NCCP regimen, clinical judgement, local policy, prescribing review or pharmacy verification.

febrile_neutropenia_or_prolonged_grade4.label: Febrile neutropenia or ANC <0.5 ×10⁹/L for >1 week

options.label: Bilirubin normal and enzymes below adjustment bands
Bilirubin normal; AST/ALT >1.5–5 ×ULN with ALP >2.5–5 ×ULN — 75% dose
Bilirubin 1–1.5 ×ULN and/or AST/ALT >5–10 ×ULN with ALP <6 ×ULN — 50% dose
Bilirubin >1.5 ×ULN or AST/ALT >10 ×ULN or ALP >6 ×ULN — not recommended

neuropathy_grade.label: Peripheral neuropathy grade

options.label: Grade 1 — Grade 1
options.description: Asymptomatic or mild symptoms; loss of deep tendon reflexes or paraesthesia without functional limitation.

options.label: Grade 2 — Grade 2
options.description: Moderate symptoms limiting instrumental activities of daily living.

options.label: Grade 3 — Grade 3
options.description: Severe symptoms limiting self-care activities of daily living.

neuropathy_grade.assessment_guidance: Identify the exact adverse event, assess symptoms and functional impact, and apply the toxicity-specific CTCAE v5.0 definition. Do not grade solely from a generic severity impression.

skin_toxicity_grade.label: Skin toxicity grade

options.label: Grade 1 — Grade 1
options.description: Macules/papules covering <10% body-surface area, with or without symptoms.

options.label: Grade 2 — Grade 2
options.description: 10–30% body-surface area, or limiting instrumental activities of daily living.

options.label: Grade 3 — Grade 3
options.description: >30% body-surface area, limiting self-care activities of daily living, or requiring systemic treatment.

options.label: Grade 4 — Grade 4
options.description: Life-threatening skin reaction requiring urgent intervention.

skin_toxicity_grade.assessment_guidance: Identify the exact adverse event, assess symptoms and functional impact, and apply the toxicity-specific CTCAE v5.0 definition. Do not grade solely from a generic severity impression.

stomatitis_grade.label: Stomatitis / oral mucositis grade

options.label: Grade 1 — Grade 1
options.description: Asymptomatic or mild symptoms; intervention not indicated.

options.label: Grade 2 — Grade 2
options.description: Moderate pain or ulceration not interfering with oral intake; modified diet indicated.

options.label: Grade 3 — Grade 3
options.description: Severe pain interfering with oral intake.

stomatitis_grade.assessment_guidance: Identify the exact adverse event, assess symptoms and functional impact, and apply the toxicity-specific CTCAE v5.0 definition. Do not grade solely from a generic severity impression.

output_templates.proceed: No encoded restriction was triggered in the entered domain(s). This is not an overall treatment clearance.
output_templates.coverage_gap: Only entered values were assessed; all omitted clinically relevant domains remain unassessed.
output_templates.consultant_review: The entered value requires protocol-specific clinical review.
output_templates.withhold: Withhold and reassess according to the official NCCP pathway.
output_templates.delay: Delay treatment and reassess according to the official NCCP pathway.

action.message: Delay and review thrombocytopenia according to the official NCCP protocol.

rules.explanation: Delay and review thrombocytopenia according to the official NCCP protocol.

action.message: Delay until recovery, then reduce docetaxel to 60 mg/m².

rules.explanation: Delay until recovery, then reduce docetaxel to 60 mg/m².

action.message: Administer 75% of the original docetaxel dose.

rules.explanation: Administer 75% of the original docetaxel dose.

action.message: Administer 50% of the original docetaxel dose.

rules.explanation: Administer 50% of the original docetaxel dose.

action.message: Docetaxel is not recommended in this hepatic-function band.

rules.explanation: Docetaxel is not recommended in this hepatic-function band.

action.message: For neuropathy >Grade 2, reduce to the next dose level; discontinue if persistent at the lower dose.

rules.explanation: For neuropathy >Grade 2, reduce to the next dose level; discontinue if persistent at the lower dose.

action.message: Grade 3 skin toxicity triggers reduction to the next dose level; discontinue if persistent.

rules.explanation: Grade 3 skin toxicity triggers reduction to the next dose level; discontinue if persistent.

action.message: Grade 3/4 stomatitis triggers reduction to the next dose level; discontinue if persistent.

rules.explanation: Grade 3/4 stomatitis triggers reduction to the next dose level; discontinue if persistent.

action.message: Stop docetaxel for a severe hypersensitivity reaction and manage urgently.

rules.explanation: Stop docetaxel for a severe hypersensitivity reaction and manage urgently.

administration.dose: 5 mg twice daily or 10 mg once daily

regular: FBC and liver profile before each cycle

supportive_care.mapping_basis: Docetaxel is low emetogenic risk; the regimen also requires its protocol-specific corticosteroid premedication.
supportive_care.premedications: Docetaxel dexamethasone schedule exactly as stated in the NCCP source; if missed, follow the NCCP/local rescue pathway.
supportive_care.growth_factor: G-CSF may be used according to patient/regimen risk and NCCP guidance.
supportive_care.supportive_medications_label: CUH docetaxel supportive medicines sheet (2021; pharmacy reconciliation required)
